title: Task CRUD within a project: create, paginated list, patch, delete
body:
## Goal
Give a signed-in user CRUD over the tasks inside one of their own projects, with pagination and a done-state filter on listing.

## Changes
- {"path":"src/routes/tasks.js","assumption":"creates"}
- {"path":"tests/tasks.test.js","assumption":"creates"}

## Acceptance
- [ ] `POST /projects/:projectId/tasks` with `{title, assigneeId?}` responds with the created task `{id, title, projectId, assigneeId, createdAt, done: false}`.
- [ ] `GET /projects/:projectId/tasks` responds with `{items, total, page, pageSize}`, honouring `?page` and `?pageSize`, and an optional `?done=true|false` filter that narrows items accordingly.
- [ ] `PATCH /projects/:projectId/tasks/:taskId` with `{title?, done?}` updates the task and responds with the updated task; `DELETE` removes it.
- [ ] A user cannot add, list, update, or delete tasks in a project they do not own (such requests return 404), and all task endpoints return 401 without a valid token.
- [ ] Invalid pagination query params (non-numeric or out-of-range `page`/`pageSize`) are handled sensibly with a 4xx JSON error and do not crash the server.
- [ ] `node --test tests/tasks.test.js` exits 0.

## Verify
- node --test tests/tasks.test.js (contract)
- npm run typecheck (validate)

> 🏷️ Authored with Mandrel v0.0.0 · 2026-07-12

<!-- meta: {"reason_to_exist":"Deliver the task sub-resource (create with optional assignee, paginated+filtered list, patch, delete) as its own surface (c: the tasks CRUD+pagination surface would exceed the one-pass envelope if merged into the projects Story).","mandrel_version":"0.0.0","authored_at":"2026-07-12"} -->
